title: Speculation Eva 40 trailer in a couple of days
display_title: Speculation Eva 40 trailer in a couple of days
wikitext:
[]: [Speculation] Eva 4.0 trailer in a couple of days?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jun 26, 2013 8:15 pm The first trailer for 3.0 came out a year ago. If 4.0 ends up being released in 2013 that would mean that the trailer could be released in some days. I think that they could have removed the date on the website to surprise us later. What do you think? Has there been some kind of news? And what do you think will the trailer be like? Scenes from the film or something less revealing like the piano teaser? I love trailers when they are made like the Evangelion trailers. It's really fun trying to know what the film will be like. But look at evageeks comments and at the actual 3.0 film. XD The trailers are designed to confuse us. That's why I consider them a part of the experience.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed Jun 26, 2013 8:37 pm I think they removed the date cause they probably don't have plans on releasing FINAL this year. Lets face it, if FINAL was coming out this year, we would have heard something long before 3.33 was released.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jun 26, 2013 8:42 pm But 3.0 was announced only four months before it's release. And the fact that the 3.33 blu-ray was released so fast could also mean that they want to release 4.0 this year.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Wed Jun 26, 2013 8:44 pm They keep info about these films locked up pretty tight. I don't see the upside of announcing it before 3.0. Maybe even a slight downside -- some might opt to skip 3.0 theatrically, waiting to catch up with it during the release of Final.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jun 26, 2013 8:51 pm That's also true. They announced the 2013 date when the theatrical run of 3.0 began. Maybe later they noticed it was an error. Please, I want the trailer. Some Eva speculation this summer would be awesome. A new Sagisu song.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed Jun 26, 2013 8:54 pm kuribo-04 wrote: But 3.0 was announced only four months before it's release.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jun 26, 2013 9:17 pm I thought this was gonna be an official announcement, but then realized that official announcements on this forum usually have specific dates and stuff somewhere in the titles.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jun 26, 2013 9:18 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I thought this was gonna be an official announcement, but then realized that official announcements on this forum usually have specific dates and stuff somewhere in the titles.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed Jun 26, 2013 9:20 pm How about the one I just changed it to?

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jun 26, 2013 9:28 pm Perfect. Only badthing is that the word speculation reminds that maybe we must wait another year for a trailer. I saw NGE in february 2012, and 1.11 and 2.22 in January this year. 3.33 was already announced. I have seen it all together. Between NGE and Rebuild I watched all other Anno works. If I now have to wait that long...I'm not prepared for that.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Jun 26, 2013 9:41 pm From Wikipedia & Memory: "On January 1, 2012, the official website was updated to reveal the official English title, You Can (Not) Redo, and a tentative release date for the fourth and final film in 2013." Putting the tentative 4.0 release date aside, Khara announced on January 1,2012 just the title of the third film & that it would be coming *at some point in 2012*. They gave us just the title almost a year - just over 10 & 1/2 months - before release. These movies take time. They aren't shot. They are animated. When Khara feels confident they're near the finishing line they'll slowly dish out some info. Walk before you run. The title will come first. Then a couple releases down the line will be a trailer.

[]:             Quote Post by iihieiii » Wed Jun 26, 2013 10:07 pm I doubt that will be any Teaser released at this time...especially after the "Minna no Eva Fan"2015 news today =/

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jun 26, 2013 11:00 pm But I thought they were "kind of" following the initial plan, 3.0+4.0. Just not released at the same time. 2.0 was released in 2009, 3.0 came out 2.5 years later. That's some time. They could at least have some things planned or drawn. I mean...seriously, the trailer won't have ANYTHING to do with the film anyways. The piano clip was nothing compared to the next pretentious trailer. XD First, like in evaextra a playback, then a live-action dog walking around, a close-up of Anno's face, the Moonlight Sonata in the background (that would actually be a cool song for Eva) and then Evangelion :II November 17 2013 (please). We won't get footage of the film until it's actual release in theaters. The campaign for :II or FINALE or You can (not) not. will be pretty strange. Look at how many names this film has! Well, what I wanted to say, they could at least make that kind of trailer, and we would be happy. And if the film were to be released this year they would just need a trailer, it's true that the evaextra last year was hyped, but now they have the hype of 3.0. And if they made them together like one film it could be released.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed Jun 26, 2013 11:32 pm kuribo-04 wrote: But I thought they were "kind of" following the initial plan, 3.0+4.0.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Wed Jun 26, 2013 11:37 pm Ah to be young and impatient... We cannot say for certain that any announcements on Final will be based on the time of year the announcements for the previous movies were made. As far as any news about Final this year, there are only two times where it could happen: 1. That particluar Japanese holiday where Anno drew those paper lanterns (I forget which one it is. If anyone would enlighten me, it would be appreciated). 2. When 3.33 makes its network TV debut in Japan (and there's no gurantee that will even happen this year in the first place). Until we get an offical annoucement kuribo, keep calm and live your life.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jun 26, 2013 11:53 pm cyharding wrote: kuribo, keep calm and live your life.

[]:             Quote Post by xdiesp » Thu Jun 27, 2013 9:05 am When 4.0 hits, you will barely remember about 3.0 anymore and will need to watch it again to get up to speed with it.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Thu Jun 27, 2013 9:10 am There is no chance for 4.0 to come this year so a trailer is pretty far off.
